title: Build Before Perfect
quote: Your first version does not need to be impressive. It needs to exist long enough for you to learn from it and make the next version sharper.
description: A quick reminder that momentum beats perfection. #shorts #buildinpublic

title: Compound the Boring Work
quote: Most outsized results come from repeating a useful action long after the excitement fades. Consistency creates leverage that looks invisible at first.
description: Consistency is often the most underrated growth strategy. #shorts #consistency

title: Protect Deep Focus
quote: The quality of your attention shapes the quality of your output. If you defend long stretches of focus, your work starts sounding more like you.
description: Deep focus is still a competitive advantage. #shorts #focus
